selected_problem_solved:
Accepting the verified black-box results, the proof establishes the full stated hook interpretation: for every \(n\ge1\), \(c_{\varnothing}(n)=1\), and for every hook \((a,1^b)\), \(a\ge1\), \(b\ge0\),
\[
c_{(a,1^b)}(n)
=
\#\{(w,\rho):w\in S_n,\ d=\operatorname{des}(w)\ge b+1,\ 
\rho\subseteq b\times(d-b-1),\
a=\operatorname{maj}(w)-bd+\binom b2+|\rho|\}.
\]
Equivalently,
\[
\sum_{a\ge1}c_{(a,1^b)}(n)q^a
=
\sum_{\substack{w\in S_n\\ \operatorname{des}(w)\ge b+1}}
q^{\operatorname{maj}(w)-b\operatorname{des}(w)+\binom b2}
{\operatorname{des}(w)-1\brack b}_q .
\]
selector_skipped_reason: N_PARALLEL_RUNS=1 — single run, no selection needed

all_runs.label: A
all_runs.status: Track A finalize complete (full-proof polish, seed=verified_full_proof). See solution.tex and benchmark.json.
